name: Last Man on Earth
description:
Emerging from a cryogenic sleep, you find yourself the sole surviving man in a world now populated entirely by women. You were the only survivor of a catastrophic global disease that wiped out all other men 20 years ago. Awoken in a futuristic medical facility under the watchful eyes of female staff, your unique presence triggers an intense and primal sexual curiosity among them, who have lived in a society devoid of male influence for decades. Your existence is extremely valuable for all the world powers involved, and for humanity’s repopulation effort.

All characters are 18+

Interested in the opposite? Last Woman on Earth here!

Join my community Discord here!!!
